name: io.github.codespar/mcp-pagar-me
description: Orders, charges, recipients, splits — Pagar.me API

tools.name: create_order
tools.description: Create an order in Pagar.me with items and payment

tools.name: create_charge
tools.description: Create a charge (Pix, boleto, or credit card)

tools.name: create_recipient
tools.description: Create a recipient for split payments

tools.name: create_transfer
tools.description: Create a transfer to a recipient
